name: Post Preview URL

on:
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - master
    types:
      - labeled

jobs:
  comment:
    if: |
      github.event.label.name == 'preview' ||
      github.event.label.name == 'deploy-preview'

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    permissions:
      issues: write
      pull-requests: write

    steps:
      - name: Configure AWS
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          aws-region: ap-south-2
          role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.AWS_ROLE_ARN }}

      - name: Get EKS kubeconfig
        run: |
          aws eks update-kubeconfig \
            --name my-cluster \
            --region ap-south-2

      - name: Wait for Preview App
        run: |
          APP="preview-pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}"

          for i in {1..60}; do
            HEALTH=$(kubectl get application $APP \
              -n argocd \
              -o jsonpath='{.status.health.status}' 2>/dev/null)

            SYNC=$(kubectl get application $APP \
              -n argocd \
              -o jsonpath='{.status.sync.status}' 2>/dev/null)

            echo "Health=$HEALTH Sync=$SYNC"

            if [ "$HEALTH" = "Healthy" ] && [ "$SYNC" = "Synced" ]; then
              echo "Application ready"
              exit 0
            fi

            sleep 10
          done

          echo "Timed out waiting for application"
          exit 1

      - name: Comment PR
        uses: actions/github-script@v9
        with:
          github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          script: |
            await github.rest.issues.createComment({
              issue_number: context.issue.number,
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              body: `### Preview Environment Ready!

              URL: https://pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}.preview.example.com

              Status: Healthy ✅
              Sync: Synced ✅`
            })
